examples: When depressed, they dramatically overindulge in chocolate and sweets.
It's a tendency which many scholars believe begins in childhood due to parents who overindulge their kids.
If you do overindulge, take time at the New Year to clear out the toxins with a good dose of fresh fruit and mineral water.
Customers also have the option to overindulge (a trenta macchiato with a donut on the side) or under-indulge (a skinny latte with a veggie snack box).
